title: A Stop in Time
lyrics: I guess we just light it up, you know? Is it real? Is it real? Look, yeah, it's real. It's all real. Is it? Is it real? Everything I see around me Is it reality? Individuality Sparks of calamity The roots of a tragedy Grounded in insanity A tree of conformity Bearing fruits of thought singularity Humans on the brink of extinctability Never taking responsibility Accounting their quantability In literally everything I guess we just light it up, you know?  Is it real? Is it real? Is it real? Is it real? Is it real? I'm a loner A stoner A brain donor Falling off the edge of the ledge like a sheep On the long side where myself is greed Think of only me and self right to see I'm a lone wolf This is where Nico takes up the pen Make you go crazy in the head Sheep escaping from the pen Shooting up molten lead Escaping the black hole is impossible Unless it says goodbye I'm a loner A stoner A brain donor Falling off the edge of the ledge like a sheep On the long side where myself is greed Think of only me and self right to see I'm a loner A stoner A brain donor Falling off the edge of the ledge like a sheep On the long side where myself is greed Think of only me and self right to see I'm a lone wolf He's a brain donor Stoner Slip smoke a lone wolf Walking through your self conscious maze Trap of activity Resisting all forms of gravity Race physics Confusing mathematicians Mind blowing magicians Hide behind curtains of smoke They're a joke Bitch can you see me now bitch I'm a loner A stoner A brain donor Falling off the edge of the ledge like a sheep On the long side where myself is greed Think of only me and self right to see I'm a loner A stoner A brain donor Falling off the edge of the ledge like a sheep On the long side where myself is greed Think of only me and self right to see I'm a loner Baby I'm a loner I'm a Loner I'm a loner
